data.title: Web Application Firewall
data.description: A WAF is implemented to block malicious web traffic and protect against common web vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Uses Google Cloud Armor for WAF capabilities.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Robust DDoS mitigation strategies to combat distributed denial of service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Integrates Cloud Armor Threat Intelligence for recognizing abnormal traffic patterns.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Implements both in-transit and at-rest encryption for user and video data.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.3 for data in transit and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Access Management
data.description: Highly secure authentication and access management systems for users and employees.
data.technical_spec: OAuth2.0 for user authentication and IAM roles for employee account management.

data.title: Threat Detection System
data.description: AI-driven threat detection for ongoing monitoring and incident response.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Google Cloud SCC (Security Command Center) with machine learning capabilities.
